ac_text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
title: API | Negative — Mandatory Fields Name And Primary Phone | ST1-AC1
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the test environment.
OSS (Network Operations) module is available and the feature under test is enabled.
Application is deployed and accessible in the test environment.
User account exists with the required role and permissions for the feature under test.
An invalid or boundary-violating input variant is identified and defined in Test Data.
test_data: Requirement Text: Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided.
Auth Token: Bearer token with Oss(NetworkOperations)_UPDATE scope
Request Payload: JSON body with "Mandatory Fields Name And Primary Phone": "<negative value>"
steps: Log in to the application with the permitted user account.
Navigate to the feature under test.
Execute the business action using the invalid values defined in Test Data.
Observe and record the system response.
Verify the persistence state has not changed.
expected_result: The system rejects the invalid input with a specific error or validation message identifying the reason. No data is persisted or modified as a result of the rejected action. Per AC: "Mandatory fields name and primary phone must be provided."

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Valid unique email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of updating a customer profile with a unique email.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists with email 'old_email@example.com'.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email unique_email@example.com.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile is updated with new email unique_email@example.com.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Blank email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of handling a blank email update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email ''.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Email is required.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Max-length email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of handling a max-length email update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email 'a'.repeat(254) + '@example.com'.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Email exceeds maximum length.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Format-invalid email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of handling a format-invalid email update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email 'invalid_email_format'.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Email format is invalid.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Duplicate active email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of handling a duplicate active email update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists with email 'existing_email@example.com'.
Another active customer profile exists with email 'existing_email@example.com'.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email 'existing_email@example.com'.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Email must be unique across active customers.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Self-same value email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of handling a self-same value email update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists with email 'existing_email@example.com'.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email 'existing_email@example.com'.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile remains unchanged.

ac_text: Email must be unique across active customers.
title: Duplicate inactive email update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of handling a duplicate inactive email update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
Another inactive customer profile exists with email 'inactive_email@example.com'.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045 and new email 'inactive_email@example.com'.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile is updated with new email inactive_email@example.com.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Authorized user updates customer profile successfully
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of updating a customer profile.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045.
Include updated name and phone in the request body.
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Customer profile is updated with new values.
review_feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

completeness.reason: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthorized role attempts to update profile
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it tests the flow of an unauthorized user trying to update a profile.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Guest and has no edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045.
Include updated name and phone in the request body.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error: Unauthorized access.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: Unauthenticated user attempts to update profile
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it tests the flow of an unauthenticated user trying to update a profile.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
No user is logged in.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045.
Include updated name and phone in the request body.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error: Authentication required.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: User with expired token attempts to update profile
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it tests the flow of a user with an expired token trying to update a profile.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has an expired token.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10045 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10045.
Include updated name and phone in the request body.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error: Token expired.

ac_text: Unauthorized users cannot update customer profiles.
title: User attempts to update another user's profile
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it tests the flow of a user trying to update a profile they do not own.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile with ID CUST-10046 exists.
steps: Send PUT request to update customer profile with ID CUST-10046.
Include updated name and phone in the request body.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error: Access denied to update this profile.

ac_text: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
title: Audit history captures previous and new values on successful update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of updating a customer profile and capturing audit history.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile exists with ID: CUST-10045.
steps: Update customer profile with new name and phone number.
Save the changes.
expected_result: Audit history captures old values: Name: John Doe, Phone: +1-555-0000 and new values: Name: John Smith, Phone: +1-555-0100.

ac_text: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
title: No audit record created on update failure
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of an update failure and its impact on audit history.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile exists with ID: CUST-10045.
steps: Attempt to update customer profile with invalid phone number.
Save the changes.
expected_result: No audit record is created due to the update failure.

ac_text: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
title: Audit captures partial field changes correctly
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of updating only part of the customer profile and capturing the audit history.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile exists with ID: CUST-10045.
steps: Update customer profile with new name only.
Save the changes.
expected_result: Audit history captures old values: Name: John Doe, Phone: +1-555-0000 and new values: Name: John Smith, Phone: +1-555-0000.

ac_text: Audit history must capture previous and new values.
title: Ensure audit records are immutable after creation
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow of ensuring audit records cannot be altered post-creation.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer profile exists with ID: CUST-10045.
steps: Update customer profile with new name.
Save the changes.
Attempt to modify the created audit record.
expected_result: Audit record remains unchanged and cannot be modified.

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Valid profile update triggers sync
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow from profile update to CRM sync.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists in the system.
steps: Update the customer profile with new name, phone, and email.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Profile update is successful. CRM sync job is triggered and reflects updated values.
review_feedback: correctness: API case uses UI-only language; Layer expectations need tightening

correctness.reason: API case uses UI-only language; Layer expectations need tightening

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Profile update failure does not trigger sync
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the complete flow including failure handling.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists in the system.
steps: Attempt to update the customer profile with an empty name field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Profile update fails with HTTP 400. No CRM sync job is triggered.
review_feedback: correctness: API case uses UI-only language; Layer expectations need tightening

correctness.reason: API case uses UI-only language; Layer expectations need tightening

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Sync job resilience on profile update failure
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it validates the resilience of the sync job in the event of a profile update failure.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists in the system.
steps: Attempt to update the customer profile with an empty name field.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: Profile update fails with HTTP 400. Sync job continues to function without errors.

correctness.reason: Integration flow evidence is weak; Layer expectations need tightening

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Simultaneous updates cause sync issues
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it tests the interaction between multiple updates and the sync process.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists in the system.
steps: Simultaneously update the customer profile from two different sessions.
Click the Save button in both sessions.
expected_result: One profile update is successful, and the other fails with a conflict error. CRM sync reflects the successful update.

correctness.reason: Integration flow evidence is weak; Layer expectations need tightening

ac_text: Profile update should be reflected in downstream CRM sync jobs.
title: Performance of CRM sync after profile update
classification_rationale: EndToEnd is chosen as it tests the performance of the sync process after a successful profile update.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has edit permission on Customer Profile module.
Customer ID: CUST-10045 exists in the system.
steps: Update the customer profile with new name, phone, and email.
Click the Save button.
Measure the time taken for the CRM sync to complete.
expected_result: CRM sync completes within the acceptable performance threshold of 2 seconds.

correctness.reason: Integration flow evidence is weak; Layer expectations need tightening
